tagline: Custom Outdoor Living Spaces That Become Your Favorite Place to Relax and Entertain

hero.headline:
Your Dream Outdoor Space Built by
a Family Who Cares
hero.subheadline: For over 22 years, Atlanta Porch & Patio has been designing and building the custom porches, decks, and patios that metro Atlanta families love coming home to. From first sketch to final nail, our licensed team handles everything so you can skip the stress and enjoy the transformation.

services.label: What We Build
services.headline: Outdoor Living Spaces Designed<br class="hidden md:block"> Around How You Live
services.subtitle: From screened porches that keep the bugs out to outdoor kitchens that keep the party going, we design and build every project around your family's lifestyle.

cards.title: Screened Porches
cards.description: Custom screened-in porches with 3-season and 4-season options that extend your living space while keeping out bugs, pollen, and weather.

cards.title: Custom Decks
cards.description: Premium deck construction using Brazilian hardwood, composite, or traditional wood. Designed to complement your home and elevate your backyard.

cards.title: Patios & Pavers
cards.description: Elegant stone and paver patios that create stunning outdoor living and entertaining areas, perfectly tailored to your landscape.

cards.title: Outdoor Kitchens
cards.description: Full outdoor kitchen design with countertops, built-in grills, sinks, refrigeration, and custom cabinetry for the ultimate hosting experience.

cards.title: Sunrooms
cards.description: Year-round sunroom construction that seamlessly blends indoor comfort with outdoor views, flooding your home with natural light.

cards.title: Pergolas & Fireplaces
cards.description: Custom pergolas for shade and style, plus outdoor fireplaces and fire pits that make your backyard a year-round gathering spot.

how_it_works.headline: From Vision to Your Favorite Room in the House

steps.title: Free Design Consultation
steps.description: Tell us how you want to live outdoors. We visit your home, listen to your ideas, and provide an honest, no-pressure consultation with a detailed estimate.

steps.title: 3D Renderings & Permitting
steps.description: Our design team creates photorealistic 3D renderings so you can see your project before a single board is cut. We handle all permits and HOA approvals.

steps.title: Expert Construction & Enjoyment
steps.description: Our licensed crew builds your project to exceed Georgia code, keeping you informed at every stage. Then we hand you the keys to your new favorite space.

about.label: Why Metro Atlanta Trusts Us
about.headline: A Family-Owned Firm That Treats Your Home Like Our Own
about.description: Founded in 2003 by Solomon and Susan Elisha, Atlanta Porch & Patio has spent over 22 years earning the trust of metro Atlanta homeowners. We are a full-service design-build firm, meaning one team handles your project from the initial 3D rendering through permitting and final construction. Our licensed crew builds to exceed Georgia code, and our 15 Best of Houzz awards prove we deliver craftsmanship that homeowners love.

features.title: Licensed Design-Build Team
features.description: One team from start to finish. We handle design, 3D renderings, permitting, and construction so nothing falls through the cracks.

features.title: 15x Best of Houzz Winner
features.description: Recognized year after year for outstanding design and client satisfaction by the largest home renovation community in the world.

features.title: Craftsmanship Guarantee
features.description: Every project is built to exceed Georgia building code. We stand behind our work because your outdoor space should last for decades.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project is custom, so we provide a detailed written estimate after your free consultation. No hidden fees, no change-order surprises.

guarantee.headline: Our "Built to Last" Promise
guarantee.description: If any aspect of our craftsmanship does not meet the standards we discussed, we will come back and make it right at no additional cost. We have built our 22-year reputation on standing behind every project, and we are not about to stop now.

faqs.question: How long does a typical porch or patio project take?
faqs.answer: Most projects take 4-8 weeks from start to completion, depending on size and complexity. After your free consultation, we provide a detailed timeline so you know exactly what to expect at every stage.

faqs.question: Do you handle permits and HOA approvals?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our team manages all permitting and HOA submissions as part of our full-service process. We know metro Atlanta building codes inside and out, so approvals move smoothly.

faqs.question: What is your service area?
faqs.answer: We serve Marietta, Atlanta, Alpharetta, Roswell, Sandy Springs, Woodstock, Milton, Canton, Buckhead, Kennesaw, Smyrna, Decatur, and 30+ communities throughout metro Atlanta.

faqs.question: Can I see what my project will look like before construction?
faqs.answer: Yes! We create photorealistic 3D renderings of your project so you can visualize the finished space, make adjustments, and feel confident before any construction begins.

faqs.question: What is the typical investment range for a project?
faqs.answer: Our projects typically range from $25,000 to $500,000 depending on scope and materials. During your free consultation, we will discuss your budget and provide a transparent, detailed estimate with no hidden fees.

testimonials.name: Hillary D.
testimonials.text: We just finished our screened in porch and could not be happier! Judy was fantastic - very communicative and clear throughout the entire process. The craftsmanship is beautiful.

testimonials.name: Drew M.
testimonials.text: I have worked with Atlanta Porch and Patio for over 10 years now. The team over there has always been super professional and responsive. They consistently deliver outstanding results.

testimonials.name: Andrew E.
testimonials.text: We recently worked with Atlanta Porch and Patio to build a stunning custom 3-Season Screened Porch for our home, and we couldn't be happier with the results. Highly recommend.

contact.headline:
Ready for the Outdoor Space
You've Always Wanted?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure design consultation. We will visit your home, listen to your vision, and provide an honest estimate — no obligations, no sales pitch.
